benefits.title: Powerful Digital Loyalty Schemes
benefits.description: Easy as paper, but smarter. Customers keep a digital card in their Apple or Google Wallet—no apps to download.

benefits.title: Instant Rewards
benefits.description: One quick scan by staff at checkout—customers earn digital stamps effortlessly.

benefits.title: Increased Customer Frequency
benefits.description: Proven to boost return visits by up to 20% with targeted rewards.

benefits.title: Know Your Regulars
benefits.description: See exactly how often customers visit and what they love most.

benefits.title: Hands-Free Marketing
benefits.description: Automatically send messages or special offers to bring customers back.

benefits.title: Real Results
benefits.description: Businesses typically see loyalty members spending 20% more per visit.

howItWorks.title: Sign Up in Seconds
howItWorks.description: Customers scan your branded QR code at checkout and instantly add a digital loyalty card to their phone's wallet.

howItWorks.title: Easy Digital Stamping
howItWorks.description: Staff scan customer's QR card with our simple app—just a single tap. Visits are recorded instantly.

howItWorks.title: Reward Your Regulars
howItWorks.description: Customers automatically receive notifications when rewards are ready, boosting repeat visits and loyalty effortlessly.

howItWorksSection.title: How It Works
howItWorksSection.subtitle: Designed to be simple to use for both your business and your customers.

steps.title: Your stamp card
steps.subtitle: In their Apple or Google Wallet

steps.title: They buy, you scan
steps.subtitle: In one tap, using our free app.

stats.title: 81% buy more often
stats.description: Loyalty members visit more frequently and spend more. That's not a theory—it's what the data shows.

stats.title: Regulars spend 67% more
stats.description: A returning customer is worth far more than a new one. Loyalty turns one-time visitors into your best revenue.

stats.title: 85% want a loyalty program
stats.description: Your customers are already looking for a reason to come back. Give them one.
